message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Nutzer" as User
participant "ServiceFactory" as SF
participant "PruefHandler" as PH
participant "PersonenServiceImpl" as PSI
participant "Proxy" as Proxy

== Initialisierung ==

User -> SF: 1 getPersonenService()
activate SF
SF -> PH: 2 create
activate PH
PH -> PSI: 3 create
activate PSI
PSI --> PH: 4 ziel
deactivate PSI
PH --> SF: 5 instanz
deactivate PH
SF -> Proxy: 6 create
activate Proxy
Proxy --> SF: 7 PersonenService
deactivate Proxy
SF --> User: 8 service
deactivate SF

== service.neu ==

User -> Proxy: 9 neu
activate Proxy
Proxy -> PH: 10 invoke
activate PH
PH -> PSI: 11 neu
activate PSI
PSI --> PH: 12 Person
deactivate PSI
PH --> Proxy: 13 Person
deactivate PH
Proxy --> User: 14 Person
deactivate Proxy

@enduml
```
